_purpose: OVERFIT GUARDRAIL. The set of real battles whose WINNER the turn engine currently predicts correctly. Any engine/TURN_PARAMS change MUST keep every id in `locked_pass` passing. The golden pass count may only INCREASE, never drop. See ENGINE_REBUILD/03_QA_CALIBRATION.md gate G12 and wos_sim/eval_reports.py::golden_regression.

known_miss.T12_05: near-mirror rally, real defender win (coin-flip, flagged)
known_miss.RAW_03: defender won a foundry battle - SILENT wrong winner (not flagged near-even)
known_miss.RAW_04: defender lost despite better stats - SILENT wrong winner (not flagged near-even)
known_miss.RAW_05: defender lost despite better stats (flagged near-even)
known_miss.RAW_07: defender won a 40-turn wall grind (flagged near-even)

rule: A change may FIX a known_miss (moves it into locked_pass - update this file). A change may NOT drop any locked_pass id, and may NOT increase silent_miss beyond baseline. If it does, the regression FAILS.
